side_effects.description: constipation and gas, feeling like needing to defecate, urgency during leg day workouts

protocol_notes: 3rd week of Retatrutide at 1.5mg. Also taking magnesium glycinate, Vitamin D, B12, C, Zinc, fish oil. Diet consists of greek yogurt, oats, fruits, white rice, potatoes, protein sources (chicken/steak), whey protein with milk, limited vegetables. Age 23. Experienced issue during heavy leg day training with constipation and gas creating urgency and anxiety about bowel accident.
